name: Spinach & Walnut Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the spinach very well and remove the stems. Shake off any excess water and pat dry with paper towels or spin in a lettuce spinner.
2. Tear the spinach leaves into large pieces and arrange on a shallow dish.
3. Sprinkle the salt over the spinach, stirring to combine thoroughly. Let stand for 15 minutes.
4. After standing, drain any remaining liquid and gently squeeze out excess moisture.
5. Add chopped green onions to the bowl with the spinach.
6. Mix together the olive oil and lemon juice in a separate small bowl.
7. Pour the dressing over the spinach and gently toss to coat evenly.
8. Sprinkle chopped walnuts on top.
